name: Megaport Limited
analysis: MP1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$21.1600. Trade idea: entry A$21.3500, stop A$15.8834, target A$37.7498 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
